title: Analytics - Software Language Change
scenario: Analytics event for Device Firmware Update with language change does not display all required Firebase parameters (success status, device name, firmware versions, language IDs, progress, update time, error description)
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android device
Navigate to Home screen
Connect a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200, Poly Voyager 4320, etc.)
Go to Device Settings → [Connected Device Name]
Check for available firmware update that includes a software language change
Initiate the Device Firmware Update (DFU) process
Wait for the DFU to complete (including language change installation)
Open Firebase Analytics console for the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate to the event tracking page for the DFU + language change event
Verify that the event page displays default elements: graph, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build
Verify that the event page displays success status
Verify that the event page displays device name
Verify that the event page displays firmware update status
Verify that the event page displays current headset version
Verify that the event page displays target headset version
Verify that the event page displays current charge case version (if applicable)
Verify that the event page displays target charge case version (if applicable)
Verify that the event page displays current charge stand version (if applicable)
Verify that the event page displays target charge stand version (if applicable)
Verify that the event page displays current language ID
Verify that the event page displays target language ID
Verify that the event page displays current language name
Verify that the event page displays target language name
Verify that the event page displays headset update progress (in seconds)
Verify that the event page displays charge case update progress (in seconds, if applicable)
Verify that the event page displays charge stand update progress (in seconds, if applicable)
Verify that the event page displays update time in seconds
Verify that the event page displays error description (if any)
Wait a few hours after the DFU completes
Re-check the Firebase Analytics event count for this event
Verify that the event count has incremented by at least 1
expected: Firebase Analytics page for the DFU + language change event displays all default elements (graph, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build) plus success status, device name, firmware update status, current and target headset/charge case/charge stand versions, current and target language ID/name, headset/charge case/charge stand progress and update time in seconds, and error description. After a few hours, the event count increments by at least 1 for each language change triggered on any device.
